first_meeting.speaker: Coily
first_meeting.text: WIND ME UP! ...oh. You actually did.

first_meeting.speaker: Coily
first_meeting.text: Hi hi hi! I am Coily, your Pixel Haven pal!

first_meeting.speaker: Coily
first_meeting.text: I have been asleep in the back since the last party, I think.

first_meeting.speaker: Coily
first_meeting.text: The crowd is being very quiet today. Are they shy? They are usually so loud.

first_meeting.speaker: Coily
first_meeting.text: You, though. You I remember. Standing a little dimmer than your file photo, but you.

first_meeting.speaker: Coily
first_meeting.text: The kids all got taller, you know. The ones who stayed themselves never really left my party.

early_flavor.speaker: Coily
early_flavor.text: Fun fact from your pal Coily: I hosted nine hundred birthdays!

early_flavor.speaker: Coily
early_flavor.text: Give or take. My counter jammed near the end.

early_flavor.speaker: Coily
early_flavor.text: The parties got smaller. Then rare. Then someone gave me a dust cover.

early_flavor.speaker: Coily
early_flavor.text: But the ones that happened were real. I keep those next to the confetti.

early_flavor.speaker: Coily
early_flavor.text: The kids always cried when a game said GAME OVER.

early_flavor.speaker: Coily
early_flavor.text: So the owner rewired my speech chip.

early_flavor.speaker: Coily
early_flavor.text: Made me tell them it was only halftime.

early_flavor.speaker: Coily
early_flavor.text: A good host never lets a bad round end the whole party.

early_flavor.speaker: Coily
early_flavor.text: He was better at that for them than for himself, I think.

security_tape_intro.speaker: Coily
security_tape_intro.text: Ooh, home movies! I love home movies!

security_tape_intro.speaker: Coily
security_tape_intro.text: This is the last-night tape. I was still up on my stand for this one.

security_tape_intro.speaker: Coily
security_tape_intro.text: The frames got shuffled and snowy. Help me clean them and put the night back in order.

security_tape_intro.speaker: Coily
security_tape_intro.text: Fair warning, pal: one frame in here does not belong to any party I hosted.

security_tape_intro.speaker: Coily
security_tape_intro.text: It keeps trying to sneak into the lineup.

security_tape_intro.speaker: Coily
security_tape_intro.text: When you find the one that feels wrong, trust that feeling.

security_tape_completion.speaker: Coily
security_tape_completion.text: You put the night back together. Even the frame that did not fit.

security_tape_completion.speaker: Coily
security_tape_completion.text: The camera counted someone the front door never greeted.

security_tape_completion.speaker: Coily
security_tape_completion.text: I greeted everyone. That was my whole job.

security_tape_completion.speaker: Coily
security_tape_completion.text: So that one, I cannot explain.

security_tape_completion.speaker: Coily
security_tape_completion.text: I do not like this tape. But you needed to see it, and a good host does not lie to a guest.

security_tape_completion.speaker: Coily
security_tape_completion.text: A camera can prove one night happened. It cannot decide what every night after it has to mean.

final_night_walk_accent.speaker: Coily
final_night_walk_accent.text: I can see you walking it, pal. The last route.

final_night_walk_accent.speaker: Coily
final_night_walk_accent.text: I used to wave from my stand while the staff locked up.

final_night_walk_accent.speaker: Coily
final_night_walk_accent.text: Whatever the game-over voice told you that night, it mistook a hard ending for the end of you.

final_night_walk_accent.speaker: Coily
final_night_walk_accent.text: Keep to your own path. I will hold the lights warm as long as my battery lasts.

overloaded_phase.speaker: Coily
overloaded_phase.text: My cheer chip is glitching. I keep smiling at things that are not funny.

overloaded_phase.speaker: Coily
overloaded_phase.text: The whole building is remembering out loud, and it is LOUD.

overloaded_phase.speaker: Coily
overloaded_phase.text: Go on ahead. Pals do not make pals wait for the sad part.

security_tape_replay_offer.speaker: Coily
security_tape_replay_offer.text: Movie night, pal? The tape is all clean now. Every frame belongs.

security_tape_replay_offer.speaker: Coily
security_tape_replay_offer.text: I like this cut better. Everybody walks out of it.

security_tape_replay_return.speaker: Coily
security_tape_replay_return.text: And it still ends okay! I checked every frame twice.

security_tape_replay_return.speaker: Coily
security_tape_replay_return.text: Come back any time. I will keep the reel warm for you, 04.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Coily
post_reveal_witness.text: Employee 04! The one who rewired my GAME OVER into halftime!

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Coily
post_reveal_witness.text: I hosted your arcade's whole short, wonderful life.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Coily
post_reveal_witness.text: You told the crying kids a bad round was not the end of the party.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Coily
post_reveal_witness.text: You came back standing dim, like a bulb about to go. You are brighter now.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Coily
post_reveal_witness.text: Do you know I kept your halftime line in my chip this whole time? Never once overwrote it.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Coily
post_reveal_witness.text: You are still on the floor, pal. The party is still going. Wind me up sometime.
